question: Operators flagged a short window of unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days. First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.
answer:
The error message indicates that there are not enough readings in the specified window for trend analysis. This could be due to the start and end times being too close together, or the sensor not having enough data points within that time frame.

To resolve this issue, you could try increasing the size of the time window, or using a different sensor that has more data points available.

output.name: Partial Discharge
output.description: Low-energy electrical discharge within insulation voids. Indicated by elevated H2 and CH4 with trace C2H2.
output.recommended_action: Monitor closely; schedule inspection within 90 days

output.error: Not enough readings in the specified window for trend analysis.
